info.name: LMS — Teacher: Marks & Exam Copies (v1)
info.description:
Teacher app APIs for managing student marks and uploading exam-copy PDFs.

## Scope

Every endpoint is auto-scoped to the **(class, section, subject) triples the teacher actually teaches**, derived from `teacher_time_tables`. A teacher cannot list, create, edit, or delete marks/copies for a class+subject they don't teach — the server returns 403.

## Dropdown source

The front-end needs a single dropdown showing every (class, section, subject) combination the teacher teaches. Use **GET `/teacher/classes-subjects`** — each item carries a ready-to-display `label` like `"Class 8 · A · Mathematics"` plus the three IDs needed for subsequent calls.

## Marks vs exam-copy PDFs

- **Marks** = numeric record (`marks_obtained`, `max_marks`, `grade`, etc.) — JSON requests.
- **Exam copies** = scanned file of the actual answer sheet (.pdf/.jpg/.jpeg/.png, max 2 MB) — `multipart/form-data` requests. File stored on S3 under `admin/exam-copies/`.

Both are backed by the same `exam_copies` table, so uploading a PDF on top of an existing marks row attaches the PDF to that row; uploading marks on top of a row that already has a PDF keeps the PDF intact.

## Auth

Sanctum bearer token in `authToken`.

request.description:
Returns every distinct **(class, section, subject)** combination the authenticated teacher teaches via the timetable.

Front-end uses each row's `label` directly for dropdown text and the three IDs for follow-up calls.

response.name: Sample 200

item.name: Marks — Students roster for a chosen class+section

request.description: List of students enrolled in the chosen (class, section). 403 if the teacher doesn't teach this class+section.

query.description: Match against student name / roll no

request.description: Paginated list of marks rows for the teacher's class+subject triples.
Upload marks for one student in one (class, section, subject). 403 if the teacher doesn't teach that triple. 409 if marks already exist (use update instead).

response.name: Sample 201
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Marks uploaded successfully.",
  "data": {
    "id": 451,
    "exam":     { "id": 5, "name": "Half-yearly" },
    "standard": { "id": 8, "name": "Class 8" },
    "section":  { "id": 24, "name": "A" },
    "subject":  { "id": 3, "name": "Mathematics" },
    "student":  { "id": 101, "name": "Amit Kumar", "roll_no": "001" },
    "marks_obtained": 78,
    "max_marks": 100,
    "percentage": 78,
    "grade": "A",
    "is_absent": false,
    "is_recheck": false,
    "remarks": "Good work"
  }
}

request.description: Partial update — only the fields you send are changed. Percentage is recomputed automatically.
Lists only rows that have a PDF attached. Each item includes `pdf_url` for direct viewing.
**multipart/form-data**. `pdf` is required — accepts .pdf/.jpg/.jpeg/.png, **max 2 MB**. If marks fields are included, they're saved on the same row as the file.

response.name: Sample 201
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Exam copy uploaded successfully.",
  "data": {
    "id": 451,
    "exam":     { "id": 5,  "name": "Half-yearly" },
    "standard": { "id": 8,  "name": "Class 8" },
    "section":  { "id": 24, "name": "A" },
    "subject":  { "id": 3,  "name": "Mathematics" },
    "student":  { "id": 101, "name": "Amit Kumar", "roll_no": "001" },
    "pdf_url":  "https://superlms-prod.s3.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com/admin/exam-copies/abc123.pdf",
    "marks_obtained": null,
    "max_marks": null,
    "percentage": null,
    "grade": null,
    "uploaded_at": "2026-06-04T15:32:11Z"
  }
}

item.name: Exam Copies — Update (optional PDF replace + metadata)

formdata.description: Optional — include to replace the existing PDF.

request.description: Removes the row and wipes the PDF on S3.
